temporal_description: A man and a woman are lying in bed together. The man, wearing glasses and an orange polo shirt, is propped up against pillows, smoking a cigar. The woman, with dark, curly hair and wearing a leopard-print top with red floral details, is positioned close to him, looking at him. The setting appears to be a bedroom with a dark wood headboard and white bedding. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains in a steady medium shot, capturing the intimate and relaxed moment between the two individuals. The audio consists solely of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A high-pitched, flute-like melody carries a somber and contemplative tune, creating a mood of quiet intimacy and a touch of sadness. There is no dialogue or other sound effects present.
